faq.question: Are free samples in Germany really free?
faq.answer: Yes. Legitimate Gratisproben from brands and retailers are completely free. You may need to create an account or fill out a short form, but there is no cost involved.

faq.question: How long do free samples take to arrive?
faq.answer: Most free samples arrive within 2 to 6 weeks. Some supermarket in-store samples are available immediately, while mail samples depend on the brand's processing time.

faq.question: Can I get multiple free samples from the same brand?
faq.answer: Most brands limit samples to one per household or per person. However, you can sign up for samples from many different brands simultaneously to build a large collection.

faq.question: What is the best website for German free samples?
faq.answer: Sites like Gratisproben.de and TryTreat aggregate available free samples across Germany. Supermarket websites like Kaufland.de and EDEKA.de also list their own promotions.

seo.title: Best Product Testing Websites in Germany (2026) | TryTreat
seo.description: Discover the best product testing websites in Germany. Sign up for free, test products at home, and share your feedback.

faq.question: Do I get paid for product testing?
faq.answer: Some programs offer monetary compensation, but most provide the product itself for free as your reward. The value of products can range from a few euros to several hundred euros.

faq.question: How old do I need to be to become a product tester?
faq.answer: Most product testing programs require you to be at least 18 years old. Some programs accept younger participants with parental consent.

faq.question: How long does a typical product test last?
faq.answer: Testing periods vary from a few days to several weeks, depending on the product type. Food and beauty products are typically tested quickly, while electronics may require longer evaluation.

faq.question: Can I choose which products I test?
faq.answer: Usually, you cannot choose specific products. Instead, you fill out a profile and the platform matches you with products that fit your demographics and interests.

faq.question: Are luxury brand samples available for free?
faq.answer: Yes. Department store counters for brands like Chanel, Dior, and MAC regularly provide samples. Simply visit the counter and ask about available samples.

faq.question: How often do beauty sample offers change?
faq.answer: Beauty sample offers change frequently, often weekly. New promotions are tied to product launches, seasonal campaigns, and brand events.

faq.question: Can I get free diapers in Germany?
faq.answer: Yes. Many brands like Pampers and Huggies offer free diaper samples through their websites or at supermarkets. Sign up for brand newsletters to be notified when samples become available.

faq.question: What are baby box programs?
faq.answer: Baby box programs provide a box of free baby products, often including diapers, wipes, formula samples, and baby care items. Some German hospitals and midwifery practices distribute these boxes to new parents.

faq.question: When should I start looking for baby samples?
faq.answer: Start signing up for baby sample programs as soon as you know you are pregnant. Many programs have limited quantities and require several weeks for delivery.

title: How Cashback Works: Complete Beginner Guide
description: Learn how cashback works and start earning money back on your purchases. Simple explanation of cashback programs, apps, and payment methods.
author: TryTreat Team

tableOfContents.title: How It Works Step by Step

seo.title: How Cashback Works: Beginner Guide to Earning Money Back | TryTreat
seo.description: Learn how cashback works. Simple guide to cashback apps, programs, and earning money back on everyday purchases in Germany.

faq.question: Is cashback really free money?
faq.answer: Cashback is a percentage of your purchase returned to you. You still pay the full price upfront, but receive a portion back. It is real money, not a discount.

faq.question: How do I receive my cashback earnings?
faq.answer: Most cashback platforms pay via bank transfer, PayPal, or gift cards. Some allow you to donate your earnings to charity. Payment thresholds usually range from 10 to 25 euros.

faq.question: Does cashback cost me anything?
faq.answer: No. Cashback platforms earn a commission from retailers when you shop through their links. This commission is shared with you. There is no cost to the consumer.

faq.question: Can I combine cashback with coupons?
faq.answer: Yes. In most cases, you can use a coupon code and still earn cashback on the same purchase. This combination maximizes your total savings.

title: Beginner's Guide to Coupons: Start Saving Today
description: Learn how to use coupons effectively. This beginner's guide covers digital coupons, promo codes, and smart shopping strategies in Germany.
author: TryTreat Team

tableOfContents.title: How to Use Coupons at Checkout

seo.title: Beginner's Guide to Coupons: How to Save Money | TryTreat
seo.description: Learn how to use coupons. Beginner's guide to digital coupons, promo codes, and saving money at German stores and online shops.

faq.question: What is the difference between a coupon and a promo code?
faq.answer: A coupon is a physical or digital voucher for a discount. A promo code is a text string you enter at online checkout. Both achieve the same goal: saving you money.

faq.question: Where do I find coupons in Germany?
faq.answer: You can find coupons on retailer websites, coupon platforms, brand newsletters, supermarket loyalty apps, and in physical newspapers and magazines.

faq.question: Can I use multiple coupons on one order?
faq.answer: It depends on the store's policy. Some allow stacking multiple coupons, while others limit you to one. Always check the terms before applying.

faq.question: Do expired coupons ever work?
faq.answer: Occasionally. Some retailers honor recently expired coupons as a customer service gesture, but most systems reject expired codes automatically.

title: Product Testing Explained: How It Works and Why Brands Do It
description: Understand how product testing works from both the brand and tester perspective. Learn why companies pay you to test their products.
author: TryTreat Team

tableOfContents.title: What Brands Look for in Testers
Types of Products You Can Test

seo.title: Product Testing Explained: How It Works | TryTreat
seo.description: Understand how product testing works. Why brands need testers, what the process involves, and how to become a successful product tester.

faq.question: Why do companies give away free products to test?
faq.answer: Companies need real-world feedback before launching products. Testing with real consumers helps identify issues, improve quality, and generate authentic reviews.

faq.question: Do I need to buy anything to be a product tester?
faq.answer: No. Legitimate product testing programs never require you to purchase anything. The products are provided free for you to test and keep.

faq.question: How detailed does my feedback need to be?
faq.answer: Brands appreciate honest, specific feedback. Describe your experience in detail, including what you liked, what could improve, and how the product compares to alternatives.

faq.question: Can product testing be a source of income?
faq.answer: Most product testing provides products rather than cash. However, some focus groups and market research studies offer monetary compensation in addition to free products.

faq.question: Does Kaufland have a loyalty card?
faq.answer: Yes. The Kaufland Card is free to join and earns you points on every purchase. Points can be redeemed for discounts and exclusive offers in store.

faq.question: What is the EDEKA payback program?
faq.answer: EDEKA participates in the payback points system. You collect payback points on qualifying purchases which can be redeemed for rewards or discounts.

faq.question: Are loyalty programs worth joining?
faq.answer: Yes. Most loyalty programs are free to join and offer real value through discounts, points, and exclusive deals. The key is using them consistently.

faq.question: How do I maximize loyalty point earnings?
faq.answer: Shop during bonus point promotions, use the store's app for exclusive offers, and combine loyalty rewards with coupons and cashback for maximum savings.
